sentence_reviews.text: A multimodal foundation model aligns and jointly processes text, images, audio, video, or actions through shared token spaces and cross-modal interaction.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Transformers, Cross-attention & co-attention.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports general limitations around optimization and inductive bias; Attention Is All You Need supports Transformer components.
sentence_reviews.notes: Generic limitation and dependency wording is defensible, but not directly stated as a multimodal foundation-model limitation.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal foundation models extends or specializes the architecture family Transformers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Attention Is All You Need defines Transformer architectures; modern multimodal foundation models commonly specialize Transformer backbones, but the packet lacks a direct multimodal source.
sentence_reviews.notes: The relationship is defensible as taxonomy synthesis, not exact direct support.

sentence_reviews.text: Multimodal foundation models consumes, emits, or organizes information using Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited source supports general neural data modeling, not this exact multimodal data dependency.
sentence_reviews.notes: Defensible from the node definition and taxonomy, but not directly source-verified.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Multimodal foundation models is modeled as depending on Transformers, Cross-attention & co-attention and feeding downstream nodes such as Multimodal assistants & vision-language systems, Browser, desktop & computer-use agents, Robotics & embodied AI.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Multimodal foundation models has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Contrastive and mutual-information objectives because Contrastive and mutual-information objectives is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.
